texto: Music is power, literally. You hear a certain note, or a rhythm that really clicks, and boom! You’ve got a song. Maybe only in your head. But when you’ve got the idea, the song flows out through your fingers. Nothing else does that.
explicacao: Citação de Caleb Longbons sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Music is power, literally. You hear a certain note, or a rhythm that really clicks, and boom! You…” articula reflexao, music, power em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
